headline: SanDisk Climbs 295% YTD as AI Fuels Memory Mania: Can Q1 Results Justify the Run?
summary: Shares of SanDisk (NASDAQ:SNDK) are trading near $930 in Thursday’s session, down roughly 5% on the day. The pullback cools an extraordinary 295% year-to-date (YTD) rally that has made SNDK one of the hottest AI-exposed names in the technology sector. The current SNDK share price sits almost directly on top of the $928 analyst consensus ... SanDisk Climbs 295% YTD as AI Fuels Memory Mania: Can Q1 Results Justify the Run?
